description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has four jobs: build, docs, lint, and check-pr. The build job runs on a matrix of OS and GCC versions, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, builds DFHack, runs tests, and uploads test artifacts. The docs job builds documentation, and the lint job checks code style and syntax. The check-pr job verifies that a pull request is based on the develop branch.
